name: hyperagent-codex-bridge
description: Route Codex CLI and Codex App reasoning through named Hyperagent agents using Hyperagent credits while Codex keeps local tools and approvals.

interface.shortDescription: Use Hyperagent credits and models from Codex
interface.longDescription: Install, verify, switch, audit, and troubleshoot the Hyperagent Codex Bridge across Codex CLI and Codex App without exposing OAuth tokens or replacing Codex's local tool and approval layer.
defaultPrompt: Set up Hyperagent Codex Bridge on this machine.
Switch Codex App to Hyperagent credits safely.
Audit whether recent Codex turns used Hyperagent.
